name: music_explorer
description: Backend-free demo of pict-dataexplorer — Artists → Albums → Tracks resolved from an in-memory dataset via custom Resolvers.

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Music Explorer
ExampleApplication.Summary: A backend-free hierarchical data explorer — Artists, Albums and Tracks resolved entirely from an in-memory dataset through custom Resolver functions, each record with a preview-card popout.
